generated.tagline: A neighbourhood thali stop on Surat's Ring Road
generated.blurb1: Sangam Thali House is the kind of dining hall you settle into for a long lunch. Steel plates, ceiling fans, and the steady clink of small katoris being refilled set the rhythm of the room. Regulars know which staff to wave at when they're ready for the next round of food.
generated.blurb2: Lunch fills the long tables around one and dinner picks up later in the evening. The Ring Road location on the Adajan side makes it an easy stop whether you're driving in or heading out for the night. If you want a thali that feels like a regular's haunt rather than a destination, drop in any day of the week.
